project_metadata.name: Autonomous Medallion Pipeline
project_metadata.objective: Domain-agnostic automated data cleaning with signal preservation

audit_phase.safety_trigger: Active Preservation Mode if >80% features flagged or survivor count < 10

features: Iterative VIF removal to ensure multi-collinearity control
Automated imputation (Mean/Median for numeric, Constant for categorical)

Breast_Cancer.outcome: Saved from VIF over-cleaning; 6 key features preserved.

Ames_Housing.outcome: Prevented mass feature loss; 64 features preserved.

Titanic.outcome: Successful age imputation; cabin noise pruned.

Iris.outcome: Efficient distillation; 4 features reduced to 2 with no signal loss.

next_steps: Gold Layer: Categorical Encoding strategy (One-Hot vs Target)
Gold Layer: Feature Scaling (Standard vs Robust)
